untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Historical volatility above its mean - no HV_mean baseline indicator available; (2) HV declining and IV declining - no momentum/trend detection for volatility indicators; (3) Volatility cone analysis - no volatility cone or percentile rank indicators in allowed list. The allowed indicators hvol_20 and india_vix cannot express mean comparisons, directional changes, or cone-based thresholds as specified in the original rule.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) for HV and india_vix (implied volatility proxy) for IV. However, core conditions cannot be properly expressed: comparing volatility to its own mean requires a separate baseline indicator, detecting declining volatility requires multi-period comparison operators not in the allowed set, and volatility cone instability thresholds require cone percentile indicators absent from the allowed indicator list.
